config.title: Aliasy konta #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50560"
dim g_oFKSPS : set g_oFKSPS = nothing dim g_oKontoAliasDict : set g_oKontoAliasDict = nothing
function get_stream() set get_stream = page_.root.fPlik end function
function fopen() : fopen = true dim idGlobFile : idGlobFile = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GLOBFILE,"nIndeks=GLOB_FILE_FK_ALIASY_KONT")
if idGlobFile > 0 then page_.root.ignore=true set page_.root = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5GLOBFILE,idGlobFile) else page_.root.nIndeks = clng(GLOB_FILE_FK_ALIASY_KONT) end if
set g_oFKSPS = nx_.new_sps() set g_oKontoAliasDict = nx_.slot2.new_konto_alias_dict() dim oStream : set oStream = get_stream() if not oStream.isempty() then g_oFKSPS.from_xml_string oStream.getstring() g_oKontoAliasDict.init page_.root.versionid,g_oFKSPS("konto_alias") end if page_.enableedit = true end function
function fclose end function
function fok() set g_oFKSPS("konto_alias") = g_oKontoAliasDict.array dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj() get_stream().attach pSO get_stream().write g_oFKSPS.ToString() if trans_.saveobjects() then page_.goback end if end function
function fcancel() page_.goback end function
function new_row_data() set new_row_data = g_oKontoAliasDict.create_konto_alias() end function
sub c##CTRLID_GRID##_onroot_change
end sub
AVB_ALL_GRID(CTRLID_GRID,g_oKontoAliasDict,new_row_data()) AVB_ALL_ROW(CTRLID_SYMBOL,g_oKontoAliasDict,konto,konto,new_row_data()) AVB_ALL_ROW(CTRLID_ALIAS,g_oKontoAliasDict,alias,alias,new_row_data())
function choose_konto(byref oHLI) dim idKonto : idKonto = nx_fire_choice_list(TYPEID_N5KONTO,"","","") if idKonto > 0 then dim oKonto : set oKonto = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO,idKonto) dim iRow : iRow = clng(oHLI.prop(PROPC_ROW)) if iRow > g_oKontoAliasDict.Count() then g_oKontoAliasDict.Add( new_row_data() ) end if g_oKontoAliasDict.Value(iRow-1).konto = oKonto.strSymbol end if end function
